calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

J. Michael Phelps, Esq. appeared for plaintiff E.M. Hundley Hardware, Co., a California corporation.
Grant Hundley, President of E.M. Hundley Hardware, Co., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants UC Doors & Windows, a business entity, form unknown, or Lynn E. Kolshinski, as an individual and dba UC Doors & Windows.
Default was entered against defendant Lynn E. Kolshinski, an individual and dba UC doors & Windows, on September 12, 2008.
Default was entered against defendant UC Doors & Windows, a business entity, form unknown, on December 8, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 28, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff E.M. Hundley Hardware Co., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants UC Doors & Windows, a business entity, form unknown and Lynn E. Kolshinski, as an individual and dba UC Doors & Windows as follows:

Damages/Principal - $8,699.01.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,430.87.
Costs - $310.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $10,439.88.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
